text:

> i386

> >>Description:

> > I just installed PCBSD 8.0 Beta (which is FreeBSD 8.0 release-p1) on

> > my Toshiba Satellite.

> > Specs: CPU: 1.9 Ghz Athlon X 2. Video: ATI chipset (radeonhd driver)

> > Audio: Intel (sound_hda) Wireless: (Atheros driver)

> > ACPI doesn't fully work. No suspend / resume, but I can live without it.

> >

> > What does bother me is that the laptop runs very hot 60+ C. Other

> > systems run at ~45 - 50C

> > Enabling powerd makes system very slow (almost unusable) and produces

> > the message: set freq failed, error 6

> >

> > dmesg.boot

> Error 6 corresponds to --



> #define ENXIO 6 /* Device not configured */



> -- is there a step that wasn't performed before powerd was called?

Not sure about this. It's a standard PCBSD install, I can send the rc.conf,  
loader.conf or whatever else is needed.


> Thanks,

> -Garrett
